raw_cv_text:
Amira Benslama
+44 7911 523847 | Email: amira.benslama@gmail.com | LinkedIn: amira-benslama | GitHub: AmiraBenslama |
https://amira.dev
EDUCATION
University of Cambridge | MSc Machine Learning and Machine Intelligence 2019–2021
Thesis on quantized neural networks for edge inference achieved 94.2% accuracy with 8.7x model
compression on ImageNet; published at ICLR 2021 Workshop
President of Cambridge AI Society (250+ members); organized 12 seminars with speakers from
DeepMind, Google Brain; coordinated £45K sponsorship funding
ETH Zurich | BSc Computer Science with Systems Focus 2015–2019
GPA 3.89/4.0 with distinction in all machine learning courses; awarded ETH Medal for exceptional
thesis on distributed training systems
Led systems lab teaching assistant role for 120+ students; mentored 8 junior researchers on CUDA
optimization, improving their codebases by avg. 3.2x throughput
EXPERIENCE
Stripe | Senior Machine Learning Engineer, Inference Pipelines 2022–Present
Architected real-time fraud detection inference pipeline processing 12.8M transactions/day; reduced
latency from 580ms to 94ms (6.2x improvement) through model distillation and ONNX optimization,
saving $2.3M/year in compute costs
Led cross-functional team of 5 ML engineers and 3 infrastructure engineers; designed dynamic
batching system that increased GPU utilization from 38% to 81% while maintaining P99 latency
under 120ms
Open-sourced TorchServe feature for quantized INT8 inference that achieved 4.1M downloads;
contributed to 2.8 GitHub stars from community adoption across 180+ companies
Datadog | Machine Learning Engineer, ML Platform 2021–2022
Optimized anomaly detection model serving infrastructure; migrated from TensorFlow 1.x to PyTorch
+ TorchScript, achieving 8.3x throughput improvement (2.1M inferences/sec to 17.4M
inferences/sec) on CPU-only clusters
Implemented automated A/B testing framework for inference model updates; reduced deployment
risk and enabled 3x faster iteration cycles; measured 23% uplift in false positive reduction across 50+
customer accounts
Mentored 4 junior ML engineers on production systems; established inference performance
optimization best practices adopted org-wide, reducing median model latency by 31% across 140+
production models
Palantir Technologies | Machine Learning Engineer, Inference Systems 2019–2021
Built distributed inference orchestration layer for graph neural networks on enterprise datasets; scaled
throughput from 42K to 340K inferences/sec while maintaining <180ms P99 latency across 8-GPU
clusters
Developed model serving gateway with intelligent request routing that reduced tail latency (P99) by
47% through dynamic load balancing and speculative execution strategies
Contributed to internal ML model registry and version control system; implemented automated
performance regression testing that caught model degradations before production, reducing incidents
by 56% YoY
Jane Street | Quantitative Researcher, ML Infrastructure 2018–2019
Designed ultra-low latency inference system for reinforcement learning trading models; achieved
<2.3ms end-to-end inference latency through custom C++ runtimes and SIMD optimizations on x86
hardware
Optimized neural network model compression pipeline reducing model size from 890MB to 12MB
(74x reduction) via knowledge distillation and pruning while maintaining 99.4% prediction accuracy
Established inference performance benchmarking framework tracking 18 production models across
GPU/CPU/FPGA targets; provided weekly reports guiding resource allocation decisions saving
~$1.8M quarterly in hardware costs
PROJECTS
QuantumSpark | Python, ONNX, TensorRT, Kubernetes, Redis 2021–Present
Open-source framework for deploying quantized deep learning models at scale; 8.2K GitHub stars
and 142K monthly PyPI downloads; benchmarks show 5.8x throughput improvement over standard
ONNX Runtime
Implemented adaptive quantization algorithm that automatically determines optimal precision per
layer; reduces model size by avg. 6.3x with <0.8% accuracy loss validated on 47 model architectures
PipelineOptima | Go, Protocol Buffers, gRPC, PostgreSQL, Prometheus 2020–Present
Distributed inference orchestrator with automatic request batching and model ensemble management;
deployed in production serving 890K requests/sec at Datadog and Stripe partners; 3.1K GitHub stars
Reduces inference latency variance by 64% through priority queue scheduling and dynamic request
timeout adjustment; enables 99.8% SLA compliance on variable workloads
EdgeThreshold | TensorFlow Lite, ONNX, Rust, gRPC, Redis 2019–2020
Mobile and edge inference optimization toolkit achieving 11x model compression and 7.2x latency
reduction on ARM processors; 2.3K GitHub stars and 58K downloads on pub.dev (Rust community)
Case study published demonstrating on-device multi-lingual NLP inference (40 languages) with
680KB model size achieving 94.1% accuracy; adopted by 12 commercial mobile apps across 2.8M+
users
ServeCache | Python, C++, CUDA, RDMA, FastAPI 2018–2019
High-performance model inference cache layer exploiting temporal and spatial locality; 1.9K GitHub
stars; reduces compute by 73% on repetitive inference queries with <8ms cache lookup latency
Benchmark shows 12.4x throughput improvement on transformer model serving under realistic traffic
patterns; publicly validated on BERT, T5, and LLAMA family models
EXTRACURRICULAR
NeurIPS Conference | Invited Speaker & Workshop Organizer 2021–Present
Delivered keynote 'Inference at Scale: From Edge to Enterprise' at NeurIPS 2023 and 2024 (1,200+
attendees each); published accompanying technical whitepaper with 890 citations
Organized annual 'ML Serving & Deployment' workshop attracting 450+ industry practitioners;
managed 8-person organizing committee and secured $180K sponsorship from major tech companies
Open Source Community | Maintainer & Mentor 2020–Present
Lead maintainer of 4 high-impact inference libraries (QuantumSpark, PipelineOptima,
EdgeThreshold, ServeCache) with combined 15K+ GitHub stars; manage 23 active contributors and
review 140+ PRs monthly
Established mentorship program pairing 6 junior ML engineers from underrepresented backgrounds
with industry mentors; 100% program completion rate with 5 mentees securing roles at tier-1 tech
companies (Google, Microsoft, Meta)
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Python, C++, Rust, Go, SQL, CUDA
Technologies – PyTorch, TensorFlow, ONNX, TensorRT, TorchServe, Kubernetes, gRPC, Protocol
Buffers, Redis, PostgreSQL, RDMA
Tools – Docker, Prometheus, Grafana, Git, JIRA, Jupyter, DVC, Weights & Biases, Kubeflow, Ray
name: Amira Benslama
